summary: What does it take to build an electric-vehicle charging network that really works? As EV adoption accelerates, charging operators are shifting from installing as many chargers as possible to designing networks that can reliably attract drivers, manage grid constraints and generate sustainable returns. At the same time, retail partnerships, on-site batteries, battery swapping and dedicated charging for commercial fleets are reshaping the economics of the sector. On today’s show, Tom Rowlands-Rees

summary: Nissan President and CEO Ivan Espinosa says it still makes sense to build cars in the US, despite trade tensions and a weaker yen. He speaks on "Bloomberg Surveillance." (Source: Bloomberg)

title_cn: 沃什成为焦点，股市下跌，债券收益率上升：市场总结
summary: Wall Street traders drove stocks lower and bond yields rose as Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh declined to offer clues on the path for interest rates.

title_cn: 随着供应风险上升，阿拉比卡咖啡豆自 2022 年以来涨幅最大
summary: Arabica coffee jumped the most in almost four years on Tuesday, buoyed by mounting concerns about supply in top-grower Brazil.

title_cn: 由于交易员等待沃什评论和新数据，美国股市下跌
summary: US stocks declined before the opening bell on Wednesday as traders awaited unscripted commentary from Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh and fresh economic data.

title: Oil Declines as US Says Indirect Talks With Iran Were Positive
title_cn: 美国称与伊朗的间接谈判取得积极成果，油价下跌
summary: Oil extended its biggest quarterly drop since the pandemic as traders monitored US-Iran peace talks and a market for real-world barrels that’s been in freefall.

title: US Companies Add 98,000 Jobs in June, ADP Says
title_cn: ADP 称美国企业 6 月份新增 98,000 个就业岗位
summary: Private payrolls rose by 98,000 in June after a 122,000 increase in the prior month, according to ADP Research data out Wednesday. The median estimate in a Bloomberg survey of economists called for a 120,000 increase. Michael McKee reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Reports at Least $1.4 Billion in 2025 Crypto Earnings
title_cn: 特朗普报告 2025 年加密货币收益至少为 14 亿美元
summary: President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.

title: Gold Rises Above $4,000 as Traders Weigh Inflation Outlook
title_cn: 交易员权衡通胀前景，金价升至 4,000 美元以上
summary: Gold rose above $4,000 an ounce, as traders assess whether the Federal Reserve may move to tighten policy and the state of US-Iran talks.

title: Eni and Mercuria Agree to Join Forces in Commodity Trading
title_cn: 埃尼和摩科瑞同意联手开展大宗商品交易
summary: Italian oil company Eni SpA and commodity merchant Mercuria Energy Group Ltd. signed an agreement to join forces in trading, seeking growth in an area that has seen huge price swings and profit opportunities during the war in Iran.

title: S&P Winning Streak for July at Risk With Volatile End to Month
title_cn: 标普 7 月连胜面临月末波动的风险
summary: July is a great time to buy stocks. In fact, it’s been the best month for the S&P 500 Index in the past two decades. Bulls are finding comfort in that history ahead of what stands to be an eventful stretch.

title: Software Gains as Guggenheim Says AI No ‘Death Knell’ for Sector
title_cn: 古根海姆称人工智能不会给该行业敲响“丧钟”，软件行业受益
summary: Software shares rose in premarket trading after Guggenheim upgraded a trio of companies, saying fears that artificial intelligence poses a mortal threat to the sector are overdone.

title: Alcoa Bets on Aluminum Boom With $5.6 Billion South32 Deal
title_cn: 美铝公司以 56 亿美元的 South32 交易押注铝业繁荣
summary: Alcoa Corp. has agreed to buy South32 Ltd.’s bauxite, alumina and aluminum assets in a deal worth as much as $5.6 billion, cementing its position as a top producer as long-term demand strengthens and the Iran war exposes supply concerns.

title: Coffee, Sugar Extend Rally as Adverse Weather Fuels Supply Fears
title_cn: 恶劣天气加剧供应担忧，咖啡和糖延续涨势
summary: Coffee and sugar futures extended gains in New York and London as unfavorable weather in key growing regions heightened supply concerns.

title: Wayve Files for Share Sale on LSE’s New Private Market
title_cn: Wayve 申请在伦敦证券交易所新私人市场出售股票
summary: Autonomous driving software company Wayve Technologies Ltd. has filed to sell shares on the London Stock Exchange’s new Private Securities Market, the first major company to test the novel system.

title: How Karlie Kloss Went From Cover Girl to Media Mogul
title_cn: 卡莉·克劳斯 (Karlie Kloss) 如何从封面女郎变成媒体大亨
summary: Emily Chang goes inside the world of supermodel-turned-entrepreneur Karlie Kloss to explore how she’s trying to revive magazine publishing. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Goldman Sachs Says Capital Spending Is Powering the Bull Market
title_cn: 高盛表示资本支出正在推动牛市
summary: The best quarter for stocks in six years ended on a high note, with chipmakers extending their rebound from war-driven lows and signs of economic resilience boosting confidence in corporate earnings. A rally that has added more than $8 trillion to the S&P 500's market value over the past three months gained further momentum as fresh data pointed to strength in both the labor market and consumer sentiment. Goldman Sachs Chief Global Equity Strategist Peter Oppenheimer told Bloomberg that, "for the first time in really a generation," major economies are experiencing a broad-based increase in capital spending. It's a trend that he believes is helping to underpin the current bull market.Goldman Sachs Says Capital Spending Is Powering the Bull Market (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Commodities Broker Pulled Back Into Tax Dividend Fraud Suit by UK Court
title_cn: 商品经纪商被英国法院撤回税务股息欺诈诉讼
summary: ED&F Man Capital Markets Ltd., now MCML Ltd., has been pulled back into a long-running fraud case linked to the Cum-Ex tax dividend scandal after the UK Supreme Court ruled that the Danish tax authority’s lawsuit against the commodities broker can proceed.

title: Trump’s White House Takes Aim at EU Emissions Law
title_cn: 特朗普的白宫瞄准欧盟排放法
summary: With the US warning it could ship its energy elsewhere, some countries in Europe are urging the bloc to revisit the rules.

title: US Dollar Climbs Ahead of Warsh; Anthropic Restrictions Lifted | Bloomberg Brief 7/1/2026
title_cn: 美元在沃什之前攀升；人为限制解除 |彭博简报 2026 年 7 月 1 日
summary: The US dollar strengthens as traders await Fed Chair Warsh's comments in his first public appearance alongside other central bank leaders in Sintra, Portugal. Oil declines as the US says indirect talks around Iran were positive. The US lifts its foreign access restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable 5 AI model. Collin Martin of Charles Schwab discusses the upcoming jobs report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Emerging Market Currencies Erase 2026 Gains as Dollar Advances
title_cn: 随着美元升值，新兴市场货币抹去了 2026 年的涨幅
summary: Emerging-market currencies erased gains for this year, with speculation over higher US interest rates sparking a resurgence in the US dollar.

title: Aluminum Falls to Lowest Since February as Dollar Strengthens
title_cn: 随着美元走强，铝价跌至二月份以来的最低水平
summary: Aluminum fell to the lowest since mid-February as a strengthening US dollar and the easing of tensions in the Middle East continued to pressure commodities.

title: JPMorgan Is Leading Race for French Cooling Network Provider Idex
title_cn: 摩根大通在法国冷却网络提供商 Idex 的竞争中处于领先地位
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co.’s asset management unit has emerged as the leading bidder to buy Antin Infrastructure Partners SA’s French heating and cooling network operator, Idex, people familiar with the matter said.

title: Where To Invest $100,000
title_cn: 哪里投资 100,000 美元
summary: If you had a sudden six-figure windfall, where should you invest it? Bloomberg asked top wealth advisers where they would put $100,000 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI’s Trillion-Dollar Debt Binge Fuels Century-Old Private Market
title_cn: 人工智能的万亿美元债务狂潮推动了百年私人市场
summary: A private bond market dating back more than a century is opening a new front in the trillion-dollar AI funding boom, allowing tech borrowers to sell debt directly to deep-pocketed insurance firms.

title: Kevin Warsh to Make Global Debut, US Lifts Anthropic Restrictions | The Pulse 7/1/2026
title_cn: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 首次全球亮相，美国解除人为限制脉搏 7/1/2026
summary:
"The Pulse With Francine Lacqua" is all about conversations with high profile guests in the beating heart of global business, economics, finance and politics. Based in London, we go wherever the story is, bringing you exclusive interviews and market-moving scoops.

Today's guests: Joachim Nagel, Bundesbank President; Lesetja Kganyago, South African Reserve Bank Governor; Jumana Saleheen, Vanguard Chief European Economist; Seth Carpenter, Morgan Stanley Global Chief Economist & Macro Strategy Head  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kevin Warsh to Speak at Sintra, Trump's $1.4B in Crypto Earnings | The Opening Trade 7/1/2026
title_cn: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 将在辛特拉 (Sintra) 发表讲话，特朗普的加密货币收入达 1.4 亿美元 |开盘交易 7/1/2026
summary:
Today’s main event takes place in Sintra, Portugal, where the ECB hosts the final day of its annual symposium. The Fed’s new chief Kevin Warsh makes his first public appearance outside of the US alongside the ECB’s Lagarde and BOE’s Bailey. Markets are looking for any clues about the trajectory of rates.

President Donald Trump reported earning at least $1.4 billion in 2025 from crypto and memecoin-related businesses, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.

The Opening Trade has everything you need to know as markets open across Europe. With analysis you won't find anywhere else, we break down the biggest stories of the day and speak to top guests who have skin in the game. Hosted by Anna Edwards and Tom Mackenzie. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gilts Are Giving Burnham a Pass for Now, Says Aegon’s Lynch
title_cn: 伊耿的林奇表示，后备母猪目前正在给伯纳姆通行证
summary: Gilt markets have shrugged off the lack of economic policy clarity from Andy Burnham, the likely successor to replace Keir Starmer as UK prime minister, according to Aegon Asset Management’s James Lynch.

title: The World’s Second-Biggest Company Isn’t a ‘Rock Star’ Anymore
title_cn: 全球第二大公司不再是“摇滚明星”
summary: Google had a standout year, but now, a shift in the AI trade has it lagging the Nasdaq 100.

title: South Africa Plans to Tap Rand Sukuk Bonds This Year
title_cn: 南非计划今年发行兰德伊斯兰债券
summary: South Africa will tap existing rand-denominated sukuk bonds as part of its funding plans for the current fiscal year.

title: What’s at Stake in USMCA Negotiations?
title_cn: USMCA 谈判的利害关系是什么？
summary: The US-Mexico-Canada Agreement entered into force six years ago and is the outline for almost $2 trillion in annual trade among the three countries. A countdown to the expiry of the agreement is set to begin as officials launch a review of the trade deal that President Donald Trump signed during his first term. Brendan Murray reports on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A Giant Cable Exposes Ireland’s AI Ambitions and Security Risks
title_cn: 一根巨型电缆暴露了爱尔兰的人工智能野心和安全风险
summary: A new Amazon transatlantic fiber-optic link is symbolic of the country’s tech economy, but also of its chronic lack of defense spending.

title: Meta Is Building a Cloud Business to Sell Excess AI Compute
title_cn: Meta 正在建立云业务以出售多余的人工智能计算
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. is developing plans for a cloud infrastructure business that will sell access to AI computing power and models, setting up a new vector of competition with industry leaders like Amazon Web Services, Microsoft Azure and Google Cloud.

title: Sony to End Production of Physical PlayStation Discs in 2028
title_cn: 索尼将于 2028 年停止生产 PlayStation 实体光盘
summary: Sony Group Corp. will end production of physical discs for its PlayStation video-game consoles starting in January 2028, going all in on a digital approach that will require consumers to download titles from the company’s online storefront moving forward.

title: Bloomberg Wealth: Rick Wurster
title_cn: 彭博财富：里克·沃斯特
summary: Charles Schwab has grown from a small discount brokerage into one of the largest financial services firms in the world. In this week's episode of Bloomberg Wealth, President and CEO Rick Wurster joins David Rubenstein to discuss the company's 50-year mission of making investing more accessible, how Schwab now oversees $13 trillion in client assets, and why he believes long-term investing continues to outperform trying to time the market. Wurster also shares leadership lessons from Schwab himself, and explains how the firm is navigating the future of investing. This interview was recorded May 1 in New York. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Limits on Anthropic’s Mythos Keep Foreign Firms in Limbo
title_cn: 美国对人类神话的限制使外国公司陷入困境
summary: Foreign governments, companies and financial institutions were left in limbo after the Trump administration continued to restrict access to Anthropic PBC’s Mythos 5 to a limited number of US organizations even after dropping export controls on the company’s latest artificial intelligence models.

title: Google Told to Pay Klarna Nearly $2 Billion in Shopping Spat
title_cn: 谷歌被要求向克拉纳支付近 20 亿美元的购物纠纷
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google was ordered to pay almost $2 billion to Klarna Group Plc’s Pricerunner unit in a dispute over the search-engine giant’s abuse of power in the market for comparison shopping services.

title: Taiwan Detains Super Micro Workers in China Chip Smuggling Probe
title_cn: 台湾在中国芯片走私调查中拘留超微工人
summary: Taiwanese prosecutors detained two Super Micro Computer Inc. employees following a raid of the US company’s local offices earlier this week over alleged shipments of Nvidia Corp. chips to China.

title: Bending Spoons IPO Turns Italian College Pals Into Billionaires
title_cn: Bending Spoons IPO 让意大利大学好友成为亿万富翁
summary: Four former college friends who founded software rollup Bending Spoons SpA have emerged as Italy’s youngest cohort of self-made billionaires.

title: Oracle Warns Its Splurge on AI Data Centers May Not Pay Off
title_cn: 甲骨文警告称，其在人工智能数据中心上的投入可能不会得到回报
summary: The company outlines the risks of its massive cloud build-out to meet AI demand

title: Video Search Startup Raises $100 Million From Amazon, VC Funds
title_cn: 视频搜索初创公司从亚马逊和风险投资基金筹集了 1 亿美元
summary: Twelve Labs Inc. is raising $100 million from investors including Amazon.com Inc., NEA Management Co. and Naver Ventures, boosting its efforts to develop artificial intelligence that can quickly search and analyze troves of video.

title: AI, Forging New Risks, Isn’t a Market Wizard After All
title_cn: 人工智能，带来新的风险，毕竟不是市场向导
summary: More studies are trying to answer the question: what if everyone uses the same AI tool?

title: Tech and Finance Sectors Losing 28,000 Jobs Monthly Show AI Impact on Labor
title_cn: 科技和金融行业每月失去 28,000 个工作岗位，显示人工智能对劳动力的影响
summary: Whether artificial intelligence will cause mass workforce cuts over time remains up for debate, but it is starting to leave an imprint on US employment data.

title: Google and Actor Idris Elba to Fund African Creator Access to AI
title_cn: 谷歌和演员伊德里斯·艾尔巴资助非洲创作者接触人工智能
summary: Alphabet Inc.’s Google and UK actor Idris Elba will fund access to artificial intelligence tools for African creators, with the goal of helping them produce high-quality content faster and more cheaply.

title: ByteDance Picks Brazil for Its Largest Data Center Outside China
title_cn: 字节跳动选择巴西作为中国以外最大的数据中心
summary: The TikTok creator’s $39 billion data center is the latest payoff from Lula’s courtship of Chinese investment.

title: The Wall Street Women Who Traded Finance Careers for Influencer Success
title_cn: 华尔街女性放弃金融职业换取影响力成功
summary: These pros ditched spreadsheets and trading floors to go after brand deals and social media fame.

title: Schneider to Buy Industrial AI Firm Cognite for $3.1 Billion
title_cn: 施耐德以 31 亿美元收购工业人工智能公司 Cognite
summary: Schneider Electric SE agreed to buy Cognite in a $3.1 billion all-cash deal to expand its industrial data and AI software operations, part of an accelerating push to modernize Europe’s factories.

title: Goldman Sees Hyperscaler Spending as Continued Boost for Europe Stocks
title_cn: 高盛认为超大规模支出将持续提振欧洲股市
summary: Peter Oppenheimer, chief global equity strategist at Goldman Sachs, says the ramp up in spending by hyperscalers will continue to drive earnings growth in other sectors and regions, including Europe. He speaks on Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: TikTok Eyes About 300 More Job Cuts at European Hub in Dublin
title_cn: TikTok 计划在都柏林欧洲中心再裁员约 300 人
summary: TikTok is considering cutting about 300 jobs at its European hub in Dublin, following a similarly sized round of layoffs last year.

title: French Gas Users to See Higher Bills on Network Costs, CRE Says
title_cn: CRE 表示，法国天然气用户的网络费用将上涨
summary: French natural gas consumers are set to pay more for network maintenance over the coming decades as falling demand for the fuel means the infrastructure will be financed by fewer users, the industry regulator said.

title: Anthropic Says US Lifted Restrictions on Fable 5
title_cn: Anthropic称美国取消了对《神鬼寓言5》的限制
summary: The US government removed foreign access restrictions on Anthropic's Fable 5 artificial intelligence model, clearing it for wider distribution. Anthropic said it had received notice that Commerce was lifting the curbs on access to Mythos 5 and Fable 5 AI models. Some of the restrictions on Mythos had been eased on June 26. Bloomberg's Neil Campling reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Abu Dhabi’s MGX Raises $49 Billion for One of the Biggest Ever AI Funds
title_cn: 阿布扎比的 MGX 为有史以来最大的人工智能基金之一筹集了 490 亿美元
summary: MGX has raised $49 billion for one of the biggest ever funds dedicated to artificial intelligence deals, propelling the two-year-old Abu Dhabi firm into the ranks of the most consequential investors in the sector globally.

title: US Lifts Export Restrictions on Anthropic’s Fable 5 AI Model
title_cn: 美国取消对 Anthropic 的《神鬼寓言 5》人工智能模型的出口限制
summary: The US government removed foreign access restrictions on Anthropic PBC’s Fable 5 artificial intelligence model, clearing it for wider distribution after the startup resolved the Trump administration’s safety concerns.

title: Kim Dotcom Loses Latest Appeal in Case Against Extradition to US
title_cn: Kim Dotcom 在反对引渡到美国的最新上诉中败诉
summary: Kim Dotcom, the internet entrepreneur facing extradition from New Zealand, has lost the latest round in his legal battle to avoid facing prosecution in the US.

title: OCBC to Raise Annual Tech Spending to More Than $771 Million
title_cn: 华侨银行将把年度科技支出提高到超过 7.71 亿美元
summary: Oversea-Chinese Banking Corp.  plans to increase its annual technology spending, including on artificial intelligence, to more than S$1 billion ($771 million), said a top executive.

title: An English Furniture Maker Faces AI Era of Bots Buying Sofas
title_cn: 英国家具制造商面临机器人购买沙发的人工智能时代
summary: With origins in the English countryside, The Cotswold Company is known for upscale furniture that evokes its bucolic backstory. Now it’s bracing for the era of artificial intelligence.

title: Agilent CEO on Business Strategy, Innovation
title_cn: 安捷伦首席执行官谈商业战略和创新
summary: Padraig McDonnell, President and CEO at Agilent, discusses the company's business strategy and the innovations he sees in the life sciences sector. He speaks with Minmin Low from the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Vertiv Opens Malaysia Plant to Meet AI Data Centers’ Power Needs
title_cn: Vertiv 开设马来西亚工厂以满足人工智能数据中心的电力需求
summary: US data center equipment maker Vertiv Holdings Co. opened a factory in Malaysia, underscoring the rapid pace of AI infrastructure buildout in the Asia Pacific.

title: Japan Investment Corp.'s Hata on AI, Strategic Sectors
title_cn: 日本投资公司的 Hata 谈人工智能和战略领域
summary: Yuka Hata, Senior Managing Director & Head of Fund Investments at Japan Investment Corporation, says demand for capital is growing as Japan shifts its focus toward physical AI and deep technologies. She adds that Japan’s labor shortages have heightened the need for AI-driven solutions, making the sector a key investment priority for JIC. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Panasonic Targets Further AI Growth to Build on Record Valuation
title_cn: 松下瞄准人工智能的进一步增长，以创纪录的估值为基础
summary: Panasonic Holdings Corp., the Japanese electronics conglomerate, is attracting renewed investor attention as a beneficiary of the artificial-intelligence boom.

title: Merz Sees ‘Giant Leap’ on Reforms as Coalition Meets in Berlin
title_cn: 默茨认为联盟党在柏林召开会议时改革将取得“巨大飞跃”
summary: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz expressed confidence that his coalition will deliver on a comprehensive set of reforms this week as leaders in his coalition meet in Berlin to draw up a legislative blueprint.

title: Johannesburg Faces $128 Million Funding Gap as Its Bills Mount
title_cn: 随着账单不断增加，约翰内斯堡面临 1.28 亿美元的资金缺口
summary: Johannesburg is starting a new financial year with a multibillion-rand budget that’s not fully funded, potentially deepening a crisis that’s already left it unable to pay for power and fuel supplies.

title: Starmer Suggests UK Budget Headroom Can Absorb Defense Spend Gap
title_cn: 斯塔默建议英国预算空间可以吸收国防支出缺口
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer suggested there’s room in the next UK budget to absorb a £4.7 billion ($6.2 billion) gap in spending that was revealed in the country’s defense investment plan, published on Tuesday.

title: US Says Witkoff, Kushner Had Positive Talks in Doha on Iran Deal
title_cn: 美国称维特科夫和库什纳在多哈就伊朗协议进行了积极会谈
summary: US negotiators Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner held positive discussions in Qatar and progress is being made on technical talks with Iran, according to a senior administration official, as the countries seek to turn an interim peace deal into a permanent end to the war.

title: Qatar Burnishes Its Influence As Trump’s Go-To
title_cn: 卡塔尔作为特朗普的首选，提升其影响力
summary: A gifted plane — and hosting the Iran talks — illustrate the country’s outsize role

title: France to Hold First Round of Presidential Election April 18
title_cn: 法国将于 4 月 18 日举行第一轮总统选举
summary: France will hold the first round of its upcoming presidential election on April 18, 2027, with a potential run-off set for May 2 if no candidate secures a majority.

title: ‘Taylor Swift Tax’ Stirs Bad Blood With Rhode Island Homeowners
title_cn: “泰勒斯威夫特税”激起了罗德岛州房主的不满
summary: Rhode Island’s new tax on second homes is nicknamed for its most famous part-time resident, music superstar Taylor Swift, but the levy will also squeeze owners of saltbox houses on the coast that are much less grand than the singer’s Holiday House mansion.

title: Pakistan-Afghanistan Fighting Elevates Tensions in the Region
title_cn: 巴基斯坦与阿富汗的战斗加剧了该地区的紧张局势
summary: Renewed conflict with Afghanistan dims the win Islamabad earned brokering Iran war peace.

title: Takaichi Heads to India to Boost Ties as China Tensions Rise
title_cn: 随着中国紧张局势升级，高市前往印度加强关系
summary: Japanese Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi is heading to India for a three-day trip starting Wednesday to bolster economic ties and align on security cooperation with counterpart Narendra Modi as the two Asian powers seek to wean off dependence on China.

title: Spain to Hand Papers to Over 1 Million Undocumented Migrants
title_cn: 西班牙将向超过100万无证移民发放证件
summary: The Spanish government is set to grant residency permits to more than 1 million undocumented migrants, double the number that was projected when a mass regularization program was announced in April, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Democratic Socialist Ousts 15-Term House Incumbent in Colorado
title_cn: 民主社会主义者罢免科罗拉多州 15 届众议院现任议员
summary: Democratic Socialist Melat Kiros ousted 15-term incumbent Representative Diana DeGette in Colorado’s First Congressional District, Decision Desk HQ projected, the latest sign of a growing divide over the direction of the Democratic Party.

title: Lula Holds Steady Lead Over Bolsonaro Ahead of Brazil Election
title_cn: 巴西大选前夕卢拉对博尔索纳罗保持稳定领先
summary: President Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva maintained his advantage over Flávio Bolsonaro ahead of Brazil’s October election, according to a new poll.

title: Germany’s Pension Fund Would Be Safe With Bundesbank, Nagel Says
title_cn: 内格尔表示，德国养老基金在德国央行的管理下将是安全的
summary: Germany’s central bank is well positioned to oversee the country’s planned state-backed pension fund if it’s asked to do so, according to President Joachim Nagel.

title: US Lifts Export Curbs on Anthropic's Fable 5 AI Model
title_cn: 美国解除对 Anthropic 的《神鬼寓言 5》人工智能模型的出口限制
summary: The US government has removed export controls on Anthropic’s Fable 5 AI model, clearing it for wider distribution after the startup resolved the Trump administration’s safety concerns. Bloomberg's Tom Mackenzie and Anna Edwards report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Xi Casts China’s Ruling Party as Force for Global Prosperity
title_cn: 习近平将中国执政党视为全球繁荣的力量
summary: Chinese leader Xi Jinping made a case for his ruling party as a force for global progress and prosperity – a role backed by a strong military – signaling his ambition for the nation to stand at the fore of global affairs.

title: Ukraine’s Missiles Now Have Almost Half of Russia in Reach
title_cn: 乌克兰的导弹现在几乎可以到达俄罗斯的一半
summary: Ukraine has expanded the range and intensity of its missile strikes inside Russia, triggering alerts across nearly half of the regions in the world’s largest country so far this year.

title: Lawmakers Press Malaysia to Disclose Ex-Graft Chief Share Probe
title_cn: 立法者敦促马来西亚披露前贪污主要股份调查
summary: Some Malaysian lawmakers from Prime Minister Anwar Ibrahim’s party have urged his government to disclose findings from investigations into a former anti-graft chief’s shareholdings, Malaysiakini reported Wednesday.

title: Kevin Warsh to Speak at Sintra, ECB Warns Inflation Shock Not Over | Daybreak Europe 7/1/2026
title_cn: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 将在辛特拉发表讲话，欧洲央行警告通胀冲击尚未结束黎明欧洲 7/1/2026
summary:
Bloomberg Daybreak Europe is your essential morning viewing to stay ahead. Live from London, we set the agenda for your day, catching you up with overnight markets news from the US and Asia. And we'll tell you what matters for investors in Europe, giving you insight before trading begins.

On today's show, European Central Bank officials have cautioned that the inflation shock caused by the Iran war is not over yet. But policymakers at the ECB's annual forum in Sintra stopped short of calling for another interest-rate increase for now. Kevin Warsh is due to speak at the conference, in his first appearance on the international stage as Fed Chairman.

Oil edged higher despite the US touting progress in indirect talks with Iran in Qatar. A senior US official says ships are continuing to transit the Strait of Hormuz at higher levels.

Today's guest: Sabrina Khanniche, Pictet Asset Management, Senior Economist. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: UK Defense Plan Blows £5 Billion Hole in Burnham’s Budget
title_cn: 英国国防计划导致伯纳姆预算缺口 50 亿英镑
summary: The UK’s long-awaited Defense Investment Plan leaves several hard choices for Andy Burnham to make if he becomes prime minister, including how to close an almost £5 billion ($6.6 billion) hole in his first budget.

title: Japan’s House Committee Bans National Flag Vandalism
title_cn: 日本内务委员会禁止破坏国旗
summary: A committee of Japan’s lower house passed a bill banning the desecration of the national flag, highlighting Prime Minister Sanae Takaichi’s efforts to win over the growing ranks of conservative voters.

title: Ramaphosa Revamps Cabinet at Request of Coalition Partner
title_cn: 拉马福萨应联盟伙伴的要求改造内阁
summary: South African President Cyril Ramaphosa reshuffled his cabinet after the Democratic Alliance, the second-biggest party in the governing coalition, requested personnel changes to ministries it had been assigned.

title: US Says Witkoff, Kushner Had Positive Iran Deal Talks
title_cn: 美国称威特科夫和库什纳就伊朗问题进行了积极的谈判
summary: US negotiators Jared Kushner and Steve Witkoff had positive discussions with regional leaders in Qatar and technical talks with Iran are moving ahead, according to a senior administration official. Witkoff and Kushner were in Doha as part of ongoing indirect talks between the Washington and Tehran intended to forge a longer-term peace deal. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Modi Raises Hormuz Navigation in Call With Iran’s President
title_cn: 莫迪与伊朗总统通话时提出霍尔木兹海峡航行问题
summary: Prime Minister Narendra Modi spoke by phone with Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian, emphasizing the importance of freedom of navigation in the Strait of Hormuz as Indian vessels gradually resume voyages to the Persian Gulf.

title: Trump Reports Receiving About $120,000 in Sports Events Tickets
title_cn: 特朗普报告收到约 12 万美元的体育赛事门票
summary: President Donald Trump received about $120,000 in tickets to high-profile sporting events, including the World Cup Finals, the Daytona 500 and the US Open, according to his latest annual financial disclosure.

title: CSIS' Govella on Japan PM's Visit to India
title_cn: CSIS 戈维拉谈日本首相访问印度
summary: Kristi Govella, Senior Adviser and Japan Chair at the Center for Strategic and International Studies, discusses Japanese Prime Minister Takaichi's upcoming trip to India and the outlook for relations between the two countries. She speaks with Shery Ahn on Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gojek Founder Makarim Found Guilty in Indonesia Laptops Case
title_cn: Gojek 创始人 Makarim 在印度尼西亚笔记本电脑案中被判有罪
summary: Former Indonesian Education Minister and Gojek co-founder Nadiem Makarim was found guilty of corruption over a pandemic-era procurement of Chromebooks for schools, a ruling likely to add to investor concerns about how Southeast Asia’s largest economy distinguishes graft from disputed policy and business decisions.

title: India Temple Donation Probe Casts Shadow Over Modi’s Key Project
title_cn: 印度寺庙捐赠调查给莫迪的关键项目蒙上阴影
summary: An investigation into alleged financial irregularities at a Hindu temple closely associated with Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi is threatening to tarnish one of his party’s signature projects.
